programmes.show_description: This is CBBC! Tune every day from 7.00am.

Frankensquawk's Monster. Animated series. When Professor Squawkencluck's mum comes to visit, a gigantic, enraged rubbish monster is not far behind.
The Smell of Victory. When the Fairy Squad get their wings gunked by Stinkweasel, the heroes must quest to end his reign of stinky nonsense over the forest.

programmes.show_name: Bitesize Daily: 8-9 Year Olds: Science: Sound
programmes.show_description: Learn about looking for vibrations, travelling vibrations, pitch and volume.
Grasslands. The OZT brothers go wild with adders, Exmoor ponies and hundreds of red kites.

A Meteor for the Dinosaurs, Binary Bangers and Perilous Plants. Fred Sirieix stars in Scientific First Dates, and Marie Curie reacts to space.

The Mute the Cute Defence. The possibility of a trophy sends Aoife on a crazy scheme to polish up Charlotte's game.

The Intruder. Felicity and June follow a mysterious girl to Miss Grayling's study - what does she want?
Day Trip. Maisie is determined to make Georgia's day trip memorable. Jimi is forced to take some responsibility when Ben gets into trouble. Frankie, Oscar and Shanice are home alone!
Episode 9. Stop-motion animation. The thrill-seeking eggs take up bungee jumping, the potato racers whizz around, and Mr Strawberry serenades Mrs Strawberry.

Failing to Register. Determined to prove he can accomplish a task without getting distracted, Dennis takes on the simple job of bringing the class register to the school office.
Mojo Mountain. The heroes must urgently quest to Mojo Mountain and speak to the Silver Faun to prevent Hoofius from losing his mojo forever.

programmes.show_name: Bitesize Daily: 9-10 Year Olds: Science: Earth and Space
programmes.show_description: Learn about day and night, the earth, sun and moon and the solar system.
Urban. Cam, Tyler and Aaron explore the wilds of Britain's towns and cities, meeting the speedy peregrine falcon, water voles, brown rats, and discovering a back-garden hedgehog highway.
Infectious Influencers. From Cleopatra's hairdo to Elizabeth I's flushing loo, meet history's biggest Influencers.

UK. Wildlife series. Steve is on his home turf, scouring land, sea and air for some of the deadliest critters that the UK has to offer.
Heroic Hippocampus. The doctors reveal how the human brain creates maps to prevent getting lost.

Superhero Challenge. Adam and Joe crack out the costumes and go head-to-head as superheroes.

Forgotten Fungi. Trevor quests to solve the mystery of the faulty magical cakes. However, having fallen into the invisibility flour, how will he get everyone's attention?
